name: Potato Salad with Horseradish
recipeIngredient: 4 cups approximately New potatoes, boiled and cubed
to taste Sugar, Salt, and Pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Pour the mixture over the cooked potatoes.
3. If the potatoes are well cooked and warm, it will result in a creamier salad.
